name: Baba Ghanouj
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375-400°F (190-200°C). Grill the eggplant over charcoal fire or place it on a baking dish in the center shelf of the hot oven. Bake until soft, checking after 30 minutes with a fork.
2. Alternatively, cook the eggplant in the microwave for 10-15 minutes until soft.
3. Allow the eggplant to cool, then peel off the stem and chop the ends. Remove the skin by sliding it off.
4. Chop up the entire eggplant and puree or mash it in a blender or with a fork until creamy.
5. Mix in the remaining ingredients and continue pureeing or mashing. Adjust lemon juice and salt to taste.
6. Garnish with parsley if desired, keeping in mind that excessive consumption may be carcinogenic.
